peer_group: 交运设备-汽车-其他专用车辆
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: rejected because special-vehicle manufacturing is project and order driven
capability_assessment: 海伦哲有高空作业车、消防、应急和专用车辆能力，但整车和装备项目竞争更依赖资质、订单和制造执行，当前证据不足以证明其产品平台不可复制或具备全球细分垄断。
analyst_response: Reject for now. 海伦哲: special-vehicle capability is useful but below the first-round moat threshold. triage 57.18; moat 53.00; technology 63.00; market 57.00; quality 54.00; governance 68.00.
calibrated_standard_implication: Special-vehicle companies require scarce mission-critical systems
source_urls: or category dominance; ordinary project vehicle manufacturing can be wholly rejected.
